settings.label: Lumiere Silk
settings.heading:
Elegant Silk,
Beautifully Gifted
settings.subheading: Discover silk scarves and gift-ready pieces designed to bring softness, beauty, and quiet refinement to everyday life.

settings.label: Our Philosophy
settings.heading: Timeless Beauty, Thoughtfully Presented
settings.body: Lumiere Silk is a premium accessories and gifting brand centered around elegance, softness, and refined details. From silk scarves to beautifully presented gift sets, each piece is chosen to offer a graceful and elevated experience for both personal use and meaningful gifting.

settings.label: The Collection
settings.heading: Signature Silk Scarves
settings.body: Our silk scarves are designed to feel timeless, feminine, and effortlessly elegant. With a focus on beauty, texture, and versatility, each piece is selected to add softness and sophistication to everyday style.
settings.tagline: Classic pieces made to be worn, loved, and gifted.
settings.placeholder_titles: Signature Silk Scarf|Elegant Silk Scarf|Silk Scarf Gift Box

settings.label: Gifting
settings.heading: Gift-Ready Elegance
settings.body: More than an accessory, Lumiere Silk is designed to be a beautiful gifting experience. Explore scarf gift boxes and thoughtfully paired sets created for special moments, personal treats, and meaningful gestures.

settings.label: Presentation
settings.heading: The Art of Gifting
settings.body: Every detail matters - from the softness of the silk to the presentation of the final box. Our packaging is designed to feel refined, graceful, and ready to gift, creating a memorable unboxing experience that reflects the beauty of the brand.
settings.tagline: Refined packaging, thoughtful details, timeless impression.

settings.label: Our Story
settings.heading: The World of Lumiere Silk
settings.body: Lumiere Silk was created from a love of elegance, beauty, and thoughtful design. We believe the smallest details can make a lasting impression, and that a beautifully chosen piece can bring quiet confidence, warmth, and joy. Our vision is to create a brand that feels soft, polished, and timeless - a place where silk, presentation, and gifting come together with grace.

settings.heading: Join the Lumiere Circle
settings.body: Be the first to discover new arrivals, exclusive offers, and styling inspiration - delivered softly to your inbox.
settings.note: We respect your privacy. Unsubscribe at any time.
